events.title: Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA)
events.description:
Integrated Kundalini Awakening – A Life-Altering Energy Transmission

During this event, you'll receive a direct energy transmission, awakening your Kundalini Shakti – the latent, divine, and healing energy within every individual. This awakening triggers a remarkable rewiring of your brain and central nervous system, leading to profound emotional and spiritual healing, often unattainable through other means.

As the raw Kundalini life force awakens and surges through your spine, you'll embark on a path to uncover your truest, most powerful, and divine self. This energy purges stored blockages within your energy system, guiding you toward transcendence and elevating your consciousness. It's a journey of rebirth, love, and surrender.

What Can You Expect During a Session? Lie down on a comfortable mat as soothing music plays in the background. The facilitator may gently touch or press certain chakras and meridian points on your body or use hand movements above you. Internally, a wide range of experiences may unfold, from spontaneous movements and emotional release to vivid lights, visuals, and a sense of bliss. Many describe it as a purifying experience, offering deep insights and realizations that lead to physical, mental, energetic, and emotional release. It's a transformative journey beyond the reach of mere words.

Kundalini energy clears accumulated blockages in your energy system, promotes the development of all energy centers, brings clarity and self-understanding to life, restores inner strength and self-confidence, increases energy potential, which leads to financial expansion, enhances sexuality, cultivates a state of happiness, and promotes harmony and tranquility. After a certain number of sessions you will feel more alive and orgasmic.

IMPORTANT: This is not Kundalini yoga session and meditation. This is a life force energy awakening where you can experience strong emotional or physical release, an energetic shift or a visual download. Get ready for a transformative journey.

Before the Session:

 
 Arrive a few minutes early to get settled.

 
 
 Wear loose, comfortable clothing, avoiding clothing with metal zippers or snaps down the front.

 
 
 Consider eating lightly or not at all before the session; an empty stomach is ideal, but a light snack such as fruit is acceptable.

 
 
 If you consume meat, try to refrain from it in the days leading up to the session.

 
 
 Avoid coffee, alcohol, or other substances prior to the class.

 

 
 This session can only be joined by adults 16+

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Anna Sohana has dedicated her life to helping others awaken their inner potential and activate the Divine within themselves.

Her grounded and embodied approach to spiritual practices allows everyone to dive deeply into self-discovery and personal transformation.

Anna has been practicing many forms of Holistic Healing for over 20 years. She is a Certified Yoga Teacher, Body Therapist, Musically Trained Sound Healing Practitioner, Breathwork Facilitator, Certified Astrologer and Facilitator of Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA).

Anna offers shamanic ceremonies, groups, private sessions and education. Her global mission is to change people's understanding of their relationship with themselves and the world around them, to enable them to create a life based on their fundamental needs for joy and freedom.

events.title: Shadow Dance
events.description:
🔥 SHADOW DANCE 🔥

A Deep, Dark, and Sensual Dance Journey. 🖤

A safe space for you to explore the depths of your embodied expression. 🙏

Giving you permission to fully embody all parts of yourself, guided by deep, dark, and delicious music that evokes raw, primal emotions and sensations. 🔥

The deepest, darkest, and most delicious dance floor in town! 💃🏻✨

Listen to the last Shadow Dance here: https://soundcloud.com/toltech1/shadow-21

ABOUT THE ARTIST

TOLTECH is a DJ and Master of Ceremony. He is passionate about creating fully embodied experiences that allow you to drop into your primal nature, and to connect with your truth and essence. ✨

Combining his deep loves and passions of music, dance, movement, ceremony, tantra, and community, he will guide you on a powerful journey with dark and sexy bass music, to ignite your soul. 🔥

~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~

• A safe space for embodied and emotional expression. Your tears, laughter, screams, joy, and pain are all welcome.

• This is a non-verbal space. Please leave all conversation outside. NO TALKING ON THE DANCE FLOOR.

• This is a phone-free space. Please do not use your phone in the space. NO PHOTO OR VIDEO.

• Respect yourself, and respect one another. You are encouraged to dance with other people, if you feel. You are encouraged to dance alone, if you feel. Listen to your body and your heart and follow what it true for you.

• If someone wants to dance with you, and you want to be in your own space, simply give them a "prayer hands" or "Namaste" gesture. This means "No thank you." 🙏

events.title: The Karmic Cleanse
events.description:
A journey to clear past karma and rewrite karmic identity

Your system holds more than you realize — unprocessed emotions, old karmic loops, relationship imprints, energetic residue from past experiences, and patterns you’ve outgrown but haven’t fully released.

This transformative 3-hour workshop guides you through a deep karmic cleansing process designed to help you release karmic contracts, cut cords from the past that no longer serve you, and break free from repeating loops.

Through a blend of Karma Healing, Pranic Healing, and guided somatic practices, you'll explore the energetic imprints and soul agreements that shape your life, working with powerful techniques to clear stagnant energy and create space for new possibilities.

What to Expect:

Identifying and releasing karmic contracts and cords from past relationships and experiences

Recognizing the karmic loops you're stuck in and tools to break free from them

Guided meditation and energy clearing practices

Clear heaviness from the nervous system through somatic body-based practices

Realign with your highest karmic blueprint

You will be held in a safe, trauma-informed space where your release, your tears, your breakthroughs, and your clarity are welcome.

This is for you if…

 
 You feel stuck in a cycle of emotional pain or relationship patterns - Are carrying wounds that don't make sense in this lifetime - You’ve done mindset work, but want deeper energetic and karmic release - You desire to feel lighter, clearer, and more grounded in your spiritual path - You’re ready to reconnect with your body and spirit through powerful healing

 

By the end of the journey, you will feel:

 
 Lighter in your body, Clearer in your mind, Open in your heart

 
 
 Connected to your soul’s path

 
 
 Ready to step into your life with purpose, peace, and power

 

------

You are not your Karma

You are the soul that came here to change it.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Ritika is a certified karmic energy healer and trauma-informed guide known for her grounded yet intuitive approach to emotional and spiritual healing. Her work blends ancient spiritual wisdom with modern somatic practices, creating healing that goes beyond the mind and into the body, energy, and soul.

Through her signature Karmic Healing programs, she helps people uncover and release repeating patterns rooted in karmic imprints, ancestral baggage, soul contracts, and unresolved emotional energy. Ritika has supported hundreds through heartbreak, burnout, relationship shifts, and major life transitions—helping them find closure without confrontation, calm their nervous systems, and reconnect with inner strength.

events.title: Voice • Dance • Sound
events.description:
Voice • Dance • Sound

A Ceremonial Journey Through Cacao, Voice, Movement & Living Music

An immersive two-hour ceremonial experience where cacao, voice, movement, and live music come together to create a space for deep connection, authentic expression, and inner transformation.

We begin by opening the heart with ceremonial cacao, creating a shared intention for the journey ahead. Through a gentle voice activation, participants are invited to awaken their authentic voice and reconnect with their inner landscape.

From this place of openness, the experience naturally unfolds into an embodied movement journey, guided by live music that is created in the moment. Organic rhythms, tribal grooves, and atmospheric soundscapes invite participants to move intuitively, following the wisdom of the body rather than choreography. The music draws inspiration from nature, ancestral traditions, and the elements, creating a ceremonial field where sound, movement, and presence become one.

As the energy gently settles, we gather in stillness through a sacred medicine song, followed by an immersive sound journey, allowing space for integration, reflection, and deep rest.

Facilitators

Siti Naturaleza

Ceremonial Guide • Channelled Vocals • Voice Activation • Medicine Songs • Guitar • Sound Journey

Aji San

Multi-Instrumentalist • Live Looping • Embodied Movement Guide • Tribal Rhythms

Sayuri

Multi-Instrumentalist • Charango • Flute • Harmonium • Singing Bowls • Vocals

Together, the three artists weave a live ceremonial soundscape through voice, looping, percussion, strings, wind instruments, and intuitive improvisation, creating an organic musical journey that evolves moment by moment.

No previous experience is needed. This offering is open to anyone who feels called to explore the healing qualities of cacao, voice, movement, and live ceremonial music in a safe and welcoming space.

We look forward to co-creating a beautiful and meaningful experience together.

 

⁠Early Bird: 250,000 IDR

⁠Online Pre-sale: 300,000 IDR

⁠At the Door: 350,000 IDR

Each week, a different musician or group shares their unique flavor of Kirtan, mantras, or medicine music. It’s not about performance — it’s about connection, presence, and a shared voice.

We invite you to join our warm community and experience the transformative power of music and connection.

Come as you are, sing with us, and feel the magic of community through sound.

No experience is needed.

events.title: Jungle Dance
events.description:
𝐽𝑢𝑛𝑔𝑙𝑒 𝐷𝑎𝑛𝑐𝑒 is a primal movement to nurture your nature. Facilitator, Rachel Wainwright, creates a safe space to guide you in connecting deeper to your intuition and listening to your body; inspiring you to embody your most natural way of being. Rachel encourages you to release the weight of worry about others' opinions and unshackle yourself from the chains of self-judgment; inspiring you to lighten up to get wild freely expressing yourself. Moving with intention from limitation to liberation; shedding the layers of falseness to reveal your realness. Jungle Dance will help you become more comfortable in your body and more confident in embracing your most natural self. It's truly a healing journey and empowering experience! The Jungle Dance journey is 60-min, followed by a 30-mins community connection facilitated by Rachel. This provides an opportunity to meet like-hearted individuals. Join us to deepen your connection to your true nature and the hearts of others.

 

ABOUT THE ARTIST

The creator of Jungle Dance, Rachel Wainwright, has 18 years of experience guiding people through deeply transformational embodied experiences. With extensive training in yoga, Pilates, dance and somatic movement, she creates a nurturing space for participants to reconnect with their body, deepen their intuition, move beyond limiting patterns and express themselves freely.

Her grounded and compassionate facilitation style allows people to feel safe enough to let go, move intuitively and explore the wisdom of their body. Many leave Rachel’s offerings feeling lighter, more liberated, deeply nourished and inspired to embody their authentic selves with greater confidence.

events.title: The Art of Abundance
events.description:
Your immersion into the field of Ultimate Flow.

Find an unlimited well of abundance.

A rare opportunity to receive authentic Tibetan transmission.

Enjoy guided meditations, blessings, chanting, powerful insight teachings, and warm personal guidance in a kind and supportive space.

Learn the ease of entering the Golden River.

Whether you are looking for the right direction in life, greater success, loving relationships, creativity without limits, or the confidence to live your deepest aspirations, these ancient practices become living wisdom for modern life.

Discover the Wheel of Auspicious Coincidences—a profound Tibetan teaching that reveals how inner transformation naturally aligns the conditions for wisdom, opportunity, and meaningful change. The struggle gradually gives way to effortless flow. Doors begin to open. Joy deepens. Creativity expands. Life regains its sense of wonder.

Drawing upon nearly four decades of profound meditation practice, special guest Lama Dolma translates the deepest Tibetan wisdom into direct experience, making timeless teachings immediately accessible to modern people. She has shared authentic Tibetan wisdom with students across Europe, Asia, Australia, and North America.

Come with your questions. Come with your aspirations. Leave with a clearer mind, an open heart, and a living experience that continues to unfold in every aspect of your life.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATORS

Jana Johnson is a psychospiritual counselor, energy worker, and spiritual guide at The Yoga Barn Wellness Center, as well as a longtime meditation teacher at The Yoga Barn. For many years, she has guided people through meditation, healing, and transformational practice, helping them cultivate greater presence, clarity, and connection to their own inner wisdom.

For this special workshop, Jana is joined by one of her teachers, Lama Dolma, a Western-born Tibetan Buddhist lama recognized by His Holiness the 41st Sakya Trizin. Drawing on nearly four decades of contemplative practice, Lama Dolma brings profound Tibetan teachings to life, making their timeless wisdom accessible and deeply relevant for modern practitioners.

Understand the “inner yoga” of your menstrual cycle and life stages from a vital new perspective.

This is a workshop unlike no other. A combination of essential information on women's hormones, nervous system responses, female health challenges and how this can change throughout our life.

It addresses biology, emotions, vitality and general feelings of wellbeing.

Designed to educate and empower.

It inlcudes practices tailor made to specifically to support female pelvic organs, the luteal phase, peri menopause and the female nervous system.

Understand the “inner yoga” of your menstrual cycle and life stages from a vital new perspective.

You will learn:

The biology:

 
 Hormones and a healthy menstrual cycle

 
 
 Hormones, the nervous system and peri menopause

 

Practical:

-How to work with the intelligence of your menstrual cycle for fertility, creativity, focus and somatic release

Take aways:

 
 Ways to support your energy levels & emotions throughout the month

 
 
 How to identify & ease vulnerable times of addiction, overwhelm & stress

 
 
 Support a healthy libido, natural fertility & emotional stability

 
 
 Fine-tune your practice, workouts & workload to support your overall vitality

 
 
 A deeper appreciation of your natural life stages!

 

Practices:

Session 1: Feminine Flow to support pelvic organ health

Session 2: Somatic Yin Yoga poses to support the kidney and liver meridians

The workshop includes a daily practice, lecture and time for discussion. No previous levels of experience are necessary. events.description:
Sacred Chants for the Soul

Across all spiritual traditions, sacred chanting has served as a bridge between the human heart and the Divine.

We invite you to join us for a soulful gathering where mantra, medicine songs, and devotional music will guide us into a space of presence, contemplation, and spiritual connection.

Ancient melodies to awaken the soul, open the heart, and reconnect with the peace, love, and unity that reside within us.

This is more than a concert—it is a shared experience. An invitation to sing, listen, feel, and allow the transformative power of sound to lead you into the silence of the heart.

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Raffa Martínez is a Catalan musician exploring the intersection of art and spirituality through music for over fifteen years. Trained as a percussionist in West Africa, he has performed at festivals and events worldwide. His spiritual path inspires immersive musical experiences that cultivate presence, connection, and transformation. A respected accompanist in the Kirtan, Spiritual Music, and Medicine Music communities, he has shared the stage with Ajeet, Deva Premal & Miten, Curawaka, Tito La Rosa, Sam Garrett, Maneesh de Moor, Jai Uttal, Mirabai Ceiba, Peia, Nessi Gomes, Tina Malia, Guem, and many others. His debut album, La Luz, blends devotional and medicine music.

RESONANZ is a weekly Contact to Ecstatic Dance in the center of Ubud —

Intimate, casual, and dance-focused, with an emphasis on quality music and sound.

This Week’s Curator: PRABUMI

Prabumi is a collaborative effort initiated by Muktito Adhitya, an electronic music producer and musician. He began his career at a young age, composing music as early as 7 years old. Over time, Muktito became increasingly drawn to exploring life through travel and immersion in nature. He developed a deep fascination and appreciation for the sounds of nature and felt compelled to preserve them through the medium of music, harnessing the harmonious melodies and harmonies they offer. Prabumi represents one of Muktito's most recent explorations into music, incorporating the sounds of nature, traditional world music instruments, and the earth itself. Guided by his passion and intuition, Muktito has masterfully fused these organic elements into a rich tapestry of dynamic music, imbued with the beauty of nature's own symphonies.

In this transformational workshop you will become the Master of your wellbeing as you experience the formula of Sacred Heart Connection and Cosmic Consciousness awakening. events.title: The Voice Within: A New Moon Immersion into Embodied Expression
events.description:
The New Moon is a seed point: a moment to turn inward, listen deeply, and plant an intention for what is ready to grow.

Under the New Moon in Cancer, this invitation becomes especially tender: to return home to the body, soften the places that have been guarding, and reconnect with sound as a source of belonging, emotional truth, and inner nourishment.

In this full-day immersion, opera-trained vocalist and embodiment facilitator Camila Rivera guides participants through a ceremonial journey of breath, movement, vocal activation, individual voice work, and sound healing. This is a space to explore the voice not as performance, but as a living expression of the body, the nervous system, and the emotional self.

The day moves through the five elements as a complete map of human expression:

 
 *Earth* — grounding into the base of the body and expanding its capacity to resonate

 
 
 *Water* — inviting fluidity, emotion, and movement, allowing the body to lead

 
 
 *Fire* — awakening breath, energy, vitality, and inner power

 
 
 *Air* — opening play, lightness, and the sounds we may never have given ourselves permission to make

 
 
 *Ether* — accessing the subtler frequencies that were always there, waiting to be heard

 

Each element builds on the last, creating the conditions for sound, emotion, and hidden parts of the self to emerge in a safe and embodied way.

This is not a singing class. There is no audience, no judgment, and no need to sound beautiful. You may laugh, cry, shake, whisper, hum, roar, or discover sounds you did not know were available to you. The invitation is to feel the voice from the inside — as vibration, sensation, release, and aliveness.

In the afternoon, participants will have the opportunity to receive individual voice work in a masterclass-style setting, held and witnessed by the group. This offers a rare experience of being truly seen and heard, while also learning through the voices and processes of others.

As the New Moon peaks at 5:43pm, the day closes with a sound healing ceremony. Crystal bowls and live voice create a field of rest and integration, allowing the body to absorb what has opened and seal the day with softness, clarity, and intention.

You will leave with a deeper relationship to your own sound, practical tools for breath and vocal expression, and a felt sense of what it means to come home to yourself through the voice.

No singing experience required. Open to all levels, including trained singers.

What to bring: comfortable clothing for movement, something warm for the sound healing, a journal, and an open body.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Camila Rivera is a sound healer and voice coach based in Bali, holding a Master's degree in Opera Performance and almost a decade of somatic and trauma-informed practice. Her Sound Healing Ceremony combines crystal singing bowls, shamanic instruments, and a live operatic voice into an active, guided journey through the chakras, something rare in the world of sound healing. Rather than passive relaxation, participants are guided to stay present, breathe, and move with the sound as it works through the body. Camila works with individuals, couples, and groups in Bali and online worldwide, and has facilitated at festivals and retreats across Europe and Southeast Asia.

Welcome to Womb Wisdom, a transformative journey into your sacred center - whether you have a physical womb or connect with its energetic essence. This class is an invitation to reconnect with the profound wisdom that resides in your pelvic bowl, your creative center, your seat of intuition.

Throughout history, ancient cultures have revered the womb space as a portal of creation, not just for bringing forth life, but for birthing ideas, projects, and deep healing. In our modern world, we often disconnect from this powerful energy center, leading to physical tension, emotional blockages, and creative stagnation.

In this class, through storytelling, we'll explore:

- Gentle, flowing movements that awaken and circulate womb energy

- Breathwork practices to release stagnant emotions and restore vitality

- Meditative journeys to deepen your connection with your inner wisdom

- Dance and spiral healing frequencies that resonate with and balance your sacral energy

- Ancient mudras and mantras that honor the divine feminine within

This practice is especially supportive for:

- Menstrual cycle awareness and harmony

- Awakening creativity and manifestation power

- Deepening intuition and inner knowing

This is your invitation to remember, reclaim, and rejoice in the wisdom of your sacred center.

events.title: ABUELA LUNA
events.description:
Come gather together for a ritually charged evening of music and movement to nourish the heart and elevate the soul. This is medicine music to move you, wild and free, sacred and fun.  Inspired by the loving spirit of Cacao, we reconnect as soul-family to elevate our awareness and celebrate the simple miracle of being alive at this powerfully transformational time. We’ll be holding a sacred fire to plant prayer-seeds and anchor intentions for the coming season, sing our hearts wide open, rewild and release.

The musical magic carpet weaves soulful vocals with Spanish guitar, kamel'ngoni grooves, tribal percussion, spacious electric guitar, analog drum machines and synths, and some shouts of joy along the way. Sharing both original songs and some tribal favorites, expect to become part of the band as we lift off together on a magical night!

Raio will be joined by an ensemble of stellar musicians including Carlos Romero, Ryan Narayan, Rob Recker, and Sky on guitar.

 

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Raio is a musician, producer, medicine man and DJ who’s been uplifting the tribe in Bali for the last 18 years. A devotee of movement and dance as transformational practices, he plays organic-electro live dance music sets and DJ’s ecstatic dance. He also leads sacred cacao ceremonies, medicine music concerts, and sound healing journeys, and produces music in a riverside jungle studio outside Ubud.    Along with his wife Sophie Sofree, he’s the co-founder of Wakamaia School of Sacred Fun, where they share the art of Ecstatic Dance DJ’ing, sound healing, and more.  Dedicated to presenting earth-reverent projects that heal and unite, Raio is also co-founder of an eco-community as well as Colibri Spirit Festival and BaliSpirit Festival.

events.title: Non-Violent Communication (NVC) with a Yogic Perspective
events.description:
NVC as developed by Marshall Rosenberg is an approach to communication-based on principles of nonviolence. This method has been proven to increase understanding, connection, and empathy between disagreeing, and even oppositional hostile parties. NVC is both a spiritual practice and communication tool that can be used for interpersonal conflict resolution as well as one's own personal guidance, healing and connection to higher wisdom and Self.

In this workshop, we will learn and explore these methods and practices with a deep connection to yogic philosophy and values. Space is limited to create a smaller intimate group where we all get to learn by doing with personal tailored practices that fulfill our needs and values.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

DC Leiro has almost two decades of practice with NVC, he has trained, taught and assisted with master NVC teachers on different continents. He has found NVC to be a life enhancing gift and excellent complimentary integration to the yogic path.

events.title: Deep hip opening & Trauma Release
events.description:
The hips are more than just joints, they are the body’s emotional vault, storing years of tension, suppressed emotions and past experiences. In this powerful session, Laura blends therapeutic yoga, somatic release, breathwork and mindful movement to unlock stored trauma and restore balance.

Through progressive hips opening sequences, gentle yet profound stretches and guided awareness, you will:

• Release tension and emotional blockages

• Improve mobility and flexibility

• Activate the parasympathetic nervous system, shifting from stress to deep relaxation

• Reconnect with yourself through softness and surrender

Trauma Release Exercises (TRE) will be introduced, activating the body’s natural tremor response to safely discharge deep-held tension, especially in the pelvic and psoas region. This powerful somatic tool supports the nervous system in releasing stress without needing to revisit the story, allowing for a profound sense of relief and renewal.

This session is designed for anyone carrying physical or emotional tightness, whether from past injuries, stress, or the simple wear of daily life. Expect to leave feeling lighter, freer and deeply in tune with yourself, physically, emotionally, and energetically.

What if your tight hips are holding more than just tension? Come with an open heart, and allow your hips to tell their story!

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATORS

Laura is a dedicated guide in embodied healing, blending therapeutic yoga, traditional yogic practices, breathwork and somatic awareness. Her path has been shaped by years of study and personal pilgrimage through India, where she deepened her understanding of yoga as a way of life. With a trauma-informed approach and a deeply intuitive presence, Laura creates safe spaces for release, stillness and reconnection. Her work invites the body to soften, the nervous system to settle and the self to be met, gently, honestly and with care.

Anandan Dhandapani, originally from South India, is a yoga teacher and therapist with over 15 years of experience. Trained in Hatha Yoga, Naturopathy, Ayurveda and Yoga Therapy, his work focuses on nervous system regulation, emotional well being and creating safe spaces for healing.

For the past seven years, Anand has been facilitating and hosting the Trauma Release Method through private sessions, group workshops and practitioner trainings.

Known for his calm presence, sensitivity and deep knowledge, he supports others in releasing held stress and reconnecting with balance, resilience and inner ease.

events.title: Thai Yoga Massage: Presence, Movement & Healing Touch
events.description:
Thai Yoga Massage is a beautiful practice that combines mindful touch, assisted stretching, body awareness and presence to support relaxation and connection.

In this accessible and experiential workshop, participants will be guided through simple yet effective Thai Yoga Massage techniques inspired by traditional Thai Massage, yoga and conscious movement practices. The approach is focused on cultivating quality of touch, deep listening, body awareness and the experience of massage as a meditation and mindfulness practice.

Suitable for yoga practitioners, couples, friends, bodyworkers or anyone curious about healing touch and embodied connection. No prior experience is needed.

Participants will both give and receive Thai Yoga Massage techniques, exploring ways to support relaxation, mobility, grounding and nervous system regulation through mindful touch and assisted stretching.

Please bring comfortable clothing you can move in easily, and an open and curious mind.

This workshop offers an opportunity to slow down, reconnect to the body, and experience the healing potential of presence, movement and therapeutic touch.

 

ABOUT THE TEACHER

Debora is the founder of Awakening Unity and Bayyoga & Wellbeing Studio / Bay Yoga Education Trust in New Zealand. She has been practicing and teaching yoga for around 20 years, alongside over 20 years of experience as a massage therapist and Thai Yoga Massage practitioner. Her work combines yoga, mindful movement, conscious touch and embodied awareness in an accessible and heart-centered way. Debora has offered workshops, trainings and healing sessions throughout New Zealand and Europe, creating spaces that support connection, presence, relaxation and healing through movement and therapeutic touch.

events.title: 2-Day Workshop Authentic Relating Level 1 - The ART of Being Human
events.description:
A two-day immersion into the practices of Authentic Relating

Imagine being yourself and speaking your truth at any moment in your life.

Imagine having grace under fire in times of discomfort, conflict, or stress.

Imagine building connections and relationships that are resilient and designed to last.

Welcome to the ART of Being Human level 1 two-day immersion into the practices of Authentic Relating

WHAT IS AUTHENTIC RELATING TRAINING?

Our Authentic Relating Training level 1 is a unique and profound course that helps refine communication skills and deepen human connections across all social contexts. From the workplace to the living room, from strangers to partners, and everyone in between.

The practices are designed to be as accessible, adaptable, and engaging as possible, so you can apply your new skills to your life right away, with immediate results.

This is not a lecture or seminar – it is a deep dive full-immersion training that emphasizes embodied and experiential learning and will leave you enlivened, heart and mind-opened, and deeply connected to yourself and others.

This course is truly for everyone – no matter your level of prior experience or training.

COURSE DETAILS

A team of experienced facilitators will guide you through a thoroughly tested and proven sequence of interactive exercises.

On DAY 1 we look into the foundational skills of authentic relating:

– The Five Practices of Authentic Relating

– The Three Levels of Conversation

– The Foundation of Connection

– Empathy and Authentic Listening

– The Power of Setting Context

– Dignity and Humility, Posture and Collapse & Cultivating Equanimity

On DAY 2 we focus on the tools and skills you need to lead any relationship toward a greater understanding of one another:

– The Role of the Witness

– Cultivating Genuine Curiosity

– Transforming Conflict into Connection

– Embracing Discomfort as a Path of Personal Empowerment

– Relational Aikido & Relational Alchemy

In addition to the course you will receive:

– Course notes that will help you deepen your practice in everyday life

– Membership to the ART Graduates Facebook group with access to regular zoom calls, group resources, and the opportunity to stay connected with ART graduates worldwide.

Please note that this course will be held in English. Small-group and partner exercises can be done in your own language, of course.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Our expert facilitators are highly qualified in this art and bring years of experience teaching authentic relating. Our curriculum designers have found and created the most innovative and effective relational practices available to deliver a life-changing experience that deepens with practice.

Senior Course Leader Rick Smith.

Rick has been a classroom teacher, and an education consultant, and over the past twenty years, has spoken to over 100,000 people in fifteen countries on five continents.

His best-selling book Conscious Classroom Management has now sold over a quarter million copies and continues to touch the lives of teachers and their students.

Through years of working with students and then with teachers, Rick discovered simple principles for connection, aliveness, and kindness.

The same internal muscle that allows a teacher to stay calm in a chaotic classroom, and that allows her to see the best in her students, regardless of what they look or act like, is the same muscle that allows us to awaken, to lead, to stand up, and to move mountains in the world.

These principles and approaches are at the core of his current workshops and retreats. When Rick teaches and facilitates, he offers practical ways for participants to know and love themselves, and remember their own innocence, wholeness, and “enough-ness,” especially in all the tight corners of their inner and outer worlds. He shares tools and skills that assist us all on the pathway back to unconditional self-love and acceptance.

events.title: Grief in Motion: Moving What the Body Holds
events.description:
Grief in Motion: Moving What the Body Holds

Grief is not something to fix, but something to feel, honor, and move. Many of us carry unprocessed grief from heartbreak, endings, change, unmet needs, or the weight of being human. When held inside, grief can become numbness, anxiety, or disconnection.

This workshop offers a grounded space to explore grief through movement, breath, sound, and somatic expression. Through guided practices, evocative music, and communal witnessing, we soften, release, reconnect, and remember. Where grief becomes movement, and movement becomes prayer.

Grief is not something to fix -it is something to feel, honor, and move.

So many of us carry unprocessed grief within the body: grief from endings, heartbreak, transitions, unmet needs, loss of identity, or the collective weight of being human. When grief is suppressed, it can manifest as numbness, anxiety, disconnection, or emotional stagnation.

This workshop offers a gentle and powerful space to meet grief through movement, breath, sound, and somatic expression. Together, we will explore how the body naturally wants to release, soften, tremble, and transform when given permission and safety.

Through guided practices, evocative music, and communal witnessing, participants are invited to reconnect to their emotional landscape and discover the medicine that lives within honest expression.

This is a space for tenderness, humanity and remembrance. Where grief becomes movement, and movement becomes prayer.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Grief in Motion is a sacred exploration of movement, music, and embodied healing guided by Alana and Sophie Sôfrēē.

Alana’s path weaves together professional dance, yoga, somatics, trauma work, meditation, and hypnotherapy, creating spaces rooted in authenticity, playfulness, and transformation. She is also part of Amenti. Alongside her, Sophie brings her medicine as a DJ, musician, and facilitator known for crafting soulful journeys through rhythm, emotion, and connection.

Together, they offer a compassionate space where grief is welcomed, witnessed, and gently moved through the body toward deeper aliveness, remembrance, and liberation.

events.title: Mind Sound Resonance
events.description:
In the quiet corners of the body, unspoken stories live. Some as tension, some as fatigue, some as grief we’ve forgotten how to name. Through the layers of our being, beyond muscle and breath, rests the subtle body, the Manomaya Kosha, where the mind and memory meet. In this session, we invite you to enter that space, held by the ancient science of vibration.

Through the repetition of sacred sound, both aloud and inward, this practice initiates resonance that reaches into cellular memory. These are not mere mantras; they are vibrational keys that gently unlock the places we have guarded, consciously or not.

Why come to this space?

Because you’ve felt that tension in your chest that never quite leaves.

Because you crave a form of release that doesn’t require words or effort.

Because trauma, whether deep or recent, doesn’t always speak in language, it speaks in vibration.

What MSRT offers:

• A safe space to meet the unresolved: within the resonance of sound, the nervous system is cradled in safety.

• Deep parasympathetic activation: calming the flood of cortisol and bringing the body back to rest and digest.

• Subtle unwinding of trauma: without having to relive, explain, or analyze, just feel and allow.

• Gentle reclamation of inner space: as the mental waves settle, clarity and grounded presence return.

It is a space to remember yourself whole. To feel the ancient medicine of sound wash through your body like a soft tide, dissolving, releasing, renewing.

Who is this for?

For the ones who hold much and speak little.

For those who feel ready to meet themselves beyond story.

For any soul called to heal through sound, stillness, and grace.

Please come as you are.

Wear something you can breathe in. Bring water, bring softness, bring nothing at all. Just come.

You will leave lighter. Not because you’ve fixed anything, but because you’ve listened.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Anand Dhandapani is a Yoga Master, naturopath and founder of Samudra Yoga Space with over 15 years of experience guiding others through the deeper paths of healing. Rooted in the wisdom of Vedanta and Ayurveda, his work blends ancient philosophy with practical embodiment. Anand holds a diploma in Naturopathy and channels a rare presence, steady, humble and deeply intuitive. His guidance invites you to remember. In silence, sound and stillness, he offers a space where the sacred becomes tangible and the self is met, fully and gently.

events.title: The Art of Sound Healing
events.description:
The long journey of Agustian Supriatna took him to navigate through different cultures and ancient traditions around the globe. Always curious and thirsty for understanding through direct experience and experimentation.

The Art of Sound Healing condenses the various teachings he has been picking up for years, ready to be shared. It is an alluring music experience that takes the audience to the inner healing journey with ancient Sanskrit mantras, Sufi chanting, Javanese and Sundanese traditional lullabies. While using these sacred scriptures, he composes the music with his own voice and colours. Agustian surprises with new sounds and a variety of music instruments such as bansuri (Indian bamboo flute), suling (Sundanese bamboo flute), karinding (Sundanese bamboo jaw harp), tabla (Indian drum), gambus (Sumatrans oud), ngoni (west African harp), Tibetan singing bowls and so on. He is constantly searching for new instruments or even making and adapting them himself. In concert, he will delight everyone with his magical voice and music while leading other amazing musicians who join him in this journey.

He has found that music is the best media to channel his heritage as a healer as well as sharing his art and heart, to everyone open and willing to dive into themselves.

events.title: The Art of Transformational Sleep: A 25-HR Yoga Nidra Immersion
events.description:
Are you seeking deep relaxation and a renewed sense of well-being?

Join me for a transformative 3-day immersion in the profound practice of Yoga Nidra.

What to expect

 
 Twice-Daily Guided Yoga Nidra Sessions: Experience the profound benefits firsthand with morning and evening sessions, each exploring a unique theme to address specific needs and intentions.

 
 
 Theoretical Foundations: Uncover the science and wisdom behind Yoga Nidra, learning how it works and why it's so effective for stress relief, sleep enhancement, and emotional well-being.

 
 
 Practical Techniques: Learn simple yet powerful tools to incorporate Yoga Nidra into your daily routine for lasting transformation.

 
 
 25-Hour CE Yoga Alliance Accreditation: Deepen your knowledge and skills while earning continuing education credits.

 

Session Themes

 
 Stress Relief: Release tension and cultivate a calm mind.

 
 
 Sleep Enhancement: Improve sleep quality and wake up feeling refreshed.

 
 
 Chakra Balancing: Harmonize your energy centers for optimal health and vitality.

 
 
 Inner Peace: Cultivate a deep sense of peace and tranquility.

 

About Emily Kuser

Emily Kuser is an experienced yoga teacher, founder of High Vibe Yoga, and passionate guide on the path of Yoga Nidra. With over 20 years of teaching experience, Emily brings warmth, wisdom, and expertise to create a safe and supportive space for your journey.

Who is this for?

This immersion is open to everyone, from beginners to experienced practitioners, including:

 
 Individuals seeking deep relaxation and stress relief

 
 
 Yoga teachers and therapists wanting to expand their offerings

 
 
 Anyone interested in exploring the transformative power of Yoga Nidra

 

Registration

Don't miss this opportunity to experience the profound benefits of Yoga Nidra and earn valuable continuing education credits. Register now and take the first step towards a more restful and rejuvenated you!

Emily Kuser comes from a family of explorers, artists, and writers. She has been practicing Yoga for over 20 years and teaching Yoga since 2006 in classes, workshops, retreats and yoga teacher trainings. Emily has been a senior member of The Yoga Barn in Ubud, Bali's teaching faculty since it’s opening in 2008.

In 2010, she founded High Vibe Yoga, one of Bali's first Yoga schools and offers 50-hour, 200-hour and 300-hour yoga trainings in specialized subjects.

She has taught IAM Yoga Nidra, Embodied Flow, Anusara Yoga as well as the VITA Method and has received much inspiration from her meditation teacher the late Sally Kempton.

She is gifted with bringing people together to explore and enrich the human experience with her honest, transparent, and warm-hearted vibe.

events.title: Essence Alchemy: create self-love blends
events.description:
Embark on a transformative journey of self-discovery and healing in our workshop designed to help you consciously connect with your emotions and intuition while creating a personalized self-love blend using natural essences. This unique experience is rooted in the principles of aromatherapy, where you will explore a variety of scents that resonate deeply with your individual emotional landscape.

Throughout the workshop, you will engage in guided discussions and activities that facilitate a deeper understanding of how scents can influence your mood, feelings, and overall well-being. You will discover benefits of essential oils, gaining insight into how each aroma carries its own unique properties that can support various aspects of emotional health.

As you delve into this aromatic adventure, you will be encouraged to reflect on your current emotional state and intuition, allowing you to select the essences that best align with your personal journey. With hands-on blending sessions, you will step into the role of alchemist, crafting a face-body oil tailored specifically to your needs, desires, and intentions. This blend is more than just an oil; it symbolizes your commitment to self-love and self-care.

It will also incorporate mindfulness practices, guided meditations, an Oracle of Essences reading and self-connection with chakras, fostering a holistic approach to well-being that promotes deep self-awareness. By the end of the experience, not only will you walk away with a beautiful, personalized oil, but you will also carry with you newfound tools for nurturing your emotional well-being. Join us for this enriching workshop and take this empowering step toward embracing self-love and healing through the art of aromatherapy and intuitive creation.

Please bring a pen, use whatever makes you comfortable as we will be working sitting on cushions on the floor, and bring what you need to stay hydrated. We're waiting for you with excitement to explore something new!

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Founded in 2018 by visionary Carla Benites on the magical island of Bali, Love Pure emerged from a deep personal journey of self-discovery. Driven by her passion for exploring the intricate relationship between emotions and the effects of plant essences, Carla sought to create a brand that invites people to embrace their authentic selves and receive the pure energy of nature.

Carla believes that by identifying and releasing repressed emotions we can discover the path to personal freedom and inner peace.

Love Pure embodies a deep reverence for the earth. We harness the power of natural ingredients, ensuring each product resonates with purity and intention. Love Pure is more than just a brand; is a movement that encourages people to nourish their hearts and souls while honoring the planet.

events.title: Awaken To Self Love Immersion
events.description:
This workshop is specially designed for women who are seeking a deeper understanding and appreciation of themselves. 🌺

Embark on a journey of self-discovery and learn to love yourself fully and unconditionally.

Through a series of mindfulness exercises, guided meditations, rituals, writing and many other techniques and practices you will connect with your inner self and become more aware of your emotions, thoughts, and behaviors. 🌈

Let go of negative self-talk and self-limiting beliefs, and embrace self-affirming thoughts and behaviors.

Embrace your strengths and weaknesses, accepting yourself as you are, and cultivate a greater sense of self-compassion and self-love. 💕

You will also gain practical tools and techniques for self-care and self-nurturing. Develop your own self-care routines and make self-love and self-nurturing a daily practice. 🌸

This workshop is a powerful and life-changing experience, offering liberation from self-doubt, self-criticism, and negative self-talk.

Connect with like-minded women on a similar journey and receive the support and encouragement you need. 🌟

By the end of the workshop, you will emerge feeling more confident, empowered, and connected to your true self.

Experience a greater sense of self-worth and self-love, enabling you to live a more fulfilling and authentic life. 🌻

Don't miss this opportunity to awaken your self-love.

1.⁠ ⁠Inner Child Work: Healing and connecting with the inner child to address past wounds and promote emotional healing.

2.⁠ Self-Soothing Practices: Techniques to comfort and calm oneself during times of stress or emotional distress.

3.⁠ ⁠Breathing Practices: Various breathing techniques for relaxation, stress relief, and mindfulness.

4.⁠ ⁠Writing Practices: Journaling prompts and exercises for self-reflection and expression.

5.⁠ ⁠Releasing Practices: Methods for letting go of negative emotions, past traumas, and limiting beliefs.

6.⁠ ⁠Morning and Evening Rituals: Establishing daily rituals for starting and ending the day with intention and mindfulness.

7.⁠ ⁠Sleep Hygiene: Practices and habits that promote good quality sleep.

8.⁠ ⁠Shame Releasing Practice: Techniques for identifying, understanding, and releasing feelings of shame.

9.⁠ ⁠Emotional Freedom Techniques (EFT): A practice that combines tapping on acupressure points with focused attention on specific thoughts or emotions to release them.

10.⁠ ⁠Feeling Feelings: Encouraging the acknowledgment and acceptance of one's emotions without judgment.

events.title: Ecstatic Dance at Samyama
events.description:
✨ Ecstatic Dance at Samyama ✨

Every Wednesday | 6:30–8:30 PM

Dance beneath the stars, around the fire, and within the sacred space of Nataraja Hall.

While Bali offers many beautiful ecstatic dances, Samyama brings something uniquely its own. Our dedicated movement shala, open grass areas, and fire circle create a dance experience that feels deeply connected to nature, spacious, and alive.

Inspired by Nataraja, the Dancing Shiva, we gather to celebrate movement, self-expression, presence, and freedom. Dance in the temple-like shala, move barefoot on the earth, or find your own rhythm under the night sky.

No choreography. No expectations. Just music, movement, and the opportunity to feel fully alive.

🔥 Fire • Dance • Nature • Connection

⏰ Schedule

Doors Open: 6:00 PM

Ecstatic Dance Journey: 6:30–8:00 PM

Closing Sound Journey: 8:00–8:30 PM

Arrive early or stay after the dance and enjoy a nourishing meal at Samyama Eatery. We serve delicious vegan and vegetarian food made with love, with last orders at 9:30 PM.

Every Wednesday

Samyama, Ubud

events.title: Shambala at Dragon Tea Temple
events.description: Every second Saturday, DJ Aleceo opens Dragon Tea Temple's candlelit garden for an evening built around the intersection of world music and free movement. Doors open at 5:30 — tea is poured while the space settles — and by 6 PM the dance begins. Aleceo's catalogue spans Cafe De Anatolia, Kosa, and Pipe & Pochet: ethnic threads pulled through deep electronic grooves, unhurried and ceremony-rooted. A bonfire jam follows from 9:30, the garden still moving as the night cools. The Shambala community has gathered here every second Saturday for six years.
events.short_description: Bi-weekly garden dance party at Dragon Tea Temple — world-rooted electronic music by Aleceo, ceremonial tea, bonfire from 9:30.

events.title: Tantra Jam
events.description: A lightly facilitated gathering for female and male Tantrikas to come together as peers, lovers of life, and co-creators of sacred space. This is an invitation to meet fellow Tantrikas in the Ubud community, share practices, conversations, and embodied presence, initiate connection through breath, eye-gazing, dance, play, or your unique essence, and practice intentional relating in a safe, free-flowing space. The space is co-created and non-facilitated, relying on collective intelligence, trust, and mutual offering. Participants are encouraged to bring an intention, a practice to share, presence, openness, and boundaries. Suitable for those with some Tantra experience, who feel called to connect authentically, and are comfortable in a co-created space. Please come sober, grounded, and clear in intention, and bring fruits, snacks, and drinks to share.
events.short_description: Tantra Jam: A lightly facilitated gathering for Tantrikas in Ubud to connect, share practices, and co-create sacred space. Invitation to connect through breath, eye-gazing, dance, and play.

events.title: Alchemy of Her
events.description: A transformative 4 day journey of embodied feminine awakening. A return to your softness, your radiance, and the joy of being a woman. Many women spend their lives being who they think they need to be. The good girl. The strong one. The caretaker. The easy one. And in the process, lose touch with their joy, their softness, their aliveness, and their magnetism. Alchemy of Her is a 4-day retreat for women ready to unravel what was never theirs in the first place and reconnect with the woman beneath the conditioning - real, raw, alive. Together. Because another woman's radiance is not a threat. It is a reminder of what is possible.

Breath of Bliss is a powerful awakening experience with angelic breathwork, affirmative prayer, heart-opening practices, and ecstatic movement to explore expanded states of consciousness and deepen your communion with The All That Is. Come breathe to dissolve limiting beliefs, open your heart, and awaken as Divine Love. Feel your emotions in a safe and nurturing space, release what no longer serves, and open to euphoric revelations, greater compassion, and inspired next steps. Participants often leave with profound feelings of wonder, gratitude and connection.
